zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Helen Dethick於1448年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾紐哈爾時，她的父親Sir William Dethick11歲，母親Frances Ticknall11歲。她於大約1461年與Robert Savage在英國英格蘭德比夏爾紐哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年5月17日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Helen Dethick于1448年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾紐哈爾时，她的父亲Sir William Dethick11岁，母亲Frances Ticknall11岁。她于大约1461年与Robert Savage在英国英格兰德比夏爾紐哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年5月17日在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Helen Dethick was born in 1448, in Newhall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Dethick, was 11 and her mother, Frances Ticknall, was 11. She married Robert Savage about 1461, in Newhall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 17 May 1491, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Helen Dethick est née en 1448, à Newhall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Dethick, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Frances Ticknall, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Savage environ 1461, à Newhall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1491, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Helen Dethick 1448 in Newhall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Dethick 11 und ihre Mutter Frances Ticknall 11. Sie hat um 1461 in Newhall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Mai 1491 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Dethick è nata il nel 1448 nel Newhall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Dethick, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Frances Ticknall, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Robert Savage circa 1461, nel Newhall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 maggio 1491, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Dethickが1448年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニューハルで生まれた時，父Sir William Dethickは11歳，母Frances Ticknallは11歳であった。約1461年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニューハルでRobert Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年5月17日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Dethick(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Dethick(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Ticknall(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴홀에서 Robert Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 5월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Dethick nasceu em 1448, em Newhall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Dethick, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Frances Ticknall, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Savage aproximadamente 1461, em Newhall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1491, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Helen Dethick родилась в 1448 г. в местности нюхолл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Dethick было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Ticknall, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Savage около 1461 г. в местности нюхолл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 мая 1491 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Helen Dethick nació en 1448, en Newhall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Dethick, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Frances Ticknall, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Robert Savage aproximadamente 1461, en Newhall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1491, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
